title: Teenager Killed in Mooresville Golf Cart Accident
summary: A teenager died in a golf cart crash on Swamp Rose Drive near Golden Star Lane in Mooresville.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of operating golf carts on public roads and the need for safety precautions.

title: Woman Charged with Murder in Gaston County Shooting
summary: Kandy Walker, 51, is charged with fatally shooting Ronnie Lewis, 59, on Monday in Gaston County.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing issues with gun violence and its impact on local communities.

title: Arrest Made in January Homicide on Central Avenue
summary: A suspect has been arrested for the January 24 shooting death of Ludvin Guzman Morales, 44, on Central Avenue.
charlotte_impact: Addresses community concerns about unsolved homicides and the importance of police investigations.

title: Ancient Bones Discovered During Home Renovation in Columbia, SC
summary: Human bones, believed to be hundreds of years old, were found during a Columbia home renovation on March 12.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights into the region's history and prompts further archaeological investigation.

title: Cooler Temperatures Briefly Before Another Warm-Up
summary: A brief cool down will be followed by a warm-up, with record-breaking heat expected by Friday.
charlotte_impact: Informs residents about upcoming weather changes and potential heat-related risks.

title: Kidnapping Victim Found Safe in Cheraw, Suspect Still At Large
summary: A woman was found safe after being kidnapped in Cheraw. The suspect, Terry, is still at large; do not approach.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about kidnapping incidents and the importance of community vigilance.

title: Suspect Arrested in Fatal Hit-and-Run on The Plaza
summary: Thomas Haynes was arrested after a hit-and-run on The Plaza in Charlotte killed a 23-year-old woman and injured two others.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of reckless driving and the consequences of hit-and-run incidents.

title: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools to Present Proposed Budget for 2026-27
summary: CMS leaders will outline budget priorities, including teacher pay, school operations, student technology, and rising utility costs.
charlotte_impact: Informs the public about upcoming changes and priorities in the school system's budget.

title: One Injured in Pineville Apartment Fire
summary: One person was hurt in an apartment fire on Willow Run Road in Pineville around 3 a.m.
charlotte_impact: Reminds residents about fire safety and the importance of having working smoke detectors.

title: Mother Speaks Out Against Suspect in Son's Homicide
summary: The mother of a 24-year-old homicide victim speaks out against 47-year-old Eugene Turner, who is charged with the murder.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the emotional impact of homicide on victims' families and the community.

title: $25M Approved for BOplex Upgrades
summary: Charlotte City Council approved $25M for upgrades to Bojangles Coliseum and Ovens Auditorium.
charlotte_impact: Supports local events and sports teams by improving aging infrastructure.

title: Suspect Arrested in I-485 Road Rage Shooting
summary: Carson Parker, 41, is accused of shooting into a vehicle during a road rage incident on Saturday.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the dangers of aggressive driving and gun violence on roadways.

title: Man Charged with Murder After Body Found in Northwest Charlotte
summary: A man is charged with murder after a 24-year-old was found dead off Belmeade Drive and Mount Holly Road on March 20.
charlotte_impact: Addresses community safety concerns and the ongoing investigation into the homicide.

title: One Killed, One Hospitalized in Deadly Collision on East Independence
summary: A deadly collision on East Independence resulted in one fatality and one hospitalization on Monday night.
charlotte_impact: Reminds drivers to exercise caution and safe driving practices.

title: Former Catholic School Coach Faces Indecent Liberties Charges
summary: Johnathan Jaheim Henderson is accused of taking indecent liberties with two 16-year-old students in May 2025.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about child safety and the importance of reporting abuse.
